final:
module dynamic_range_compressor (
    input [7:0] in_signal,
    input [7:0] max_value,
    output reg [7:0] out_signal
);
    always @(*) begin
        if (in_signal > max_value) begin
            out_signal = max_value + (in_signal - max_value) / 2; // Simple compression
        end else begin
            out_signal = in_signal; // No compression
        end
    end
endmodule
